source: CardInsider extraction pipeline (v3.1.1 baseline) + redemption_rules + canonical-rate transform v1
_note: Adds earned_inr_per_inr_spent and cap_inr to every reward_rule (canonical normalised form). Engine can now read one canonical field instead of branching on reward_type/cap_kind. Also fills card-level rp_value_standard with currency-based defaults on 101 cards that were missing it (marked with _rp_value_inferred). See seed/SCHEMA_canonical.md for conversion math.
